<h1 align="center">Restless</h1>

<p align="center">
  Deterministic CLI for producing verifiable patches.
</p>

---

## The killer command

```bash
restless patch .
```

Generate a structured, human-readable patch from the current working context.

---

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/<you>/restless.git
cd restless
./install.sh
```

---

## Usage

```bash
restless --help
restless patch <path>
```

---

## Design principles

- Deterministic output
- Minimal configuration
- Readable diffs
- Small surface area

---
